title: Pregnant Women's Guide to Varicose Veins: 9 Herbal Tinctures for Relief
description: Centella asiatica tinctures are a natural remedy that has been used for centuries to help alleviate the symptoms of varicose veins. The plant, also known as gotu kola, contains properties and constituents like triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which work together to improve circulation and strengthen blood vessel walls. The triterpenoid saponins, in particular, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that help to reduce swelling and promote healing in the af...
